reason: Unlocking Chain-of-Thought (pe_cot) will improve the accuracy of my reasoning for all future questions, which is a high-value investment for long-term success in the dungeon.

Unlocking pe_plan (Plan+Reflect) is a strategic priority. It provides a planning phase before answering and, more importantly, a reflection call after the initial answer to verify and correct mistakes. This significantly reduces the risk of losing HP and increases the reliability of XP gain.

Unlocking 'pe_reflect' provides a dedicated reflection call after my answer, which is a powerful tool for correcting errors and ensuring accuracy, especially for higher-level questions. This will be vital for maintaining HP and efficiently gaining XP.
Unlocking 'ctx_enough' will provide better context for future chambers by including the last 5 Q&A pairs in the message history, which is valuable for maintaining consistency and tracking progress.
I have 1 SP available and ctx_overload will ensure I have access to the full chat history in every call, which is beneficial for tracking game state and previous decisions as the dungeon progresses.
